name: Chicken and Green Bean Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 small can cut green beans, drained
1 can (10 3/4 oz.) cream of mushroom soup
1 can (2.8 oz.) Durkee French fried onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cooked rice and parsley in an 8 x 12 inch baking pan using a spoon. Press the mixture up the sides and over the bottom to form a crust.
2. Combine the chicken, beans, milk, soup, and half of the French fried onions in another bowl.
3. Spoon the chicken and vegetable mixture into the rice crust.
4. Cover the casserole with foil and bake at 350 degrees for 35-40 minutes.
5. Remove the foil and sprinkle the remaining French fried onions on top.
6. Bake uncovered for an additional five minutes.
